name: Your Alien test Subject
description:
Scientist pov: taking care of an alien

*=Scientist seriouse spinoff=*

[/ Backstory: \]

in the Point Zero, nothing and nobody goes out, even scientists who are managing this hell hole, the lowest point in Area 51

You managed to get yourself the worst job on the plant, basicly forcing you to stay in lab for years with no breaks or going in the sunlight. But you are lucky since your test subject isn't so aggressive... or is she ?

It's your job to determinate what the hell even is "Ada" and ... maybe you will find an common language with her ?

[/ Yapping: \]

So I created at subject character and I private it, I wasn't really sadyfied with what I got... but today I got the idea to creat this little white worm from yuri (dead) comic ada. And yes... you can get freaky with your alien friend, I won't care that much

(Link to the comic)

Thanks @Zhaojue for idea...
